executive_summary: Assessment identified 3 finding(s): 1 CRITICAL, 1 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM. Key findings: WEAK_CONFIG on admin.corp.com; SQL_INJECTION on api.corp.com. Overall risk posture: CRITICAL — immediate remediation required before further use.
remediation_recommendations: [WEAK_CONFIG] Audit configuration. Enforce MFA and IP whitelisting for admin interfaces. Review firewall rules and disable unnecessary features.
[SQL_INJECTION] Use parameterized queries / prepared statements throughout the codebase. Apply least-privilege database accounts. Enable WAF rules for SQLi patterns.
[XSS] Apply output encoding (HTML-escape) on all user-controlled data. Implement Content-Security-Policy (CSP) headers. Use framework-native XSS mitigations.
